UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF RAYMOND GARCIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION CONTRACTUAL THEORY OF RECOVERY IN MSA (DISGORGEMENT OF RENT) DOES NOT CORRESPOND TO TORT THEORY ALLEGED IN COMPLAINT PARAGRAPHS 23-25 ($750,000 FOR DISTRESS AND ANGUISH). ADDITIONALLY, AS TO 1ST AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN AS TO DAMAGES RE: "RENTAL VALUE." SEE CCC1941.3(C); LANDLORD-TENANT RUTTER GUIDE 3:21.6; QUEVEDO V. BRAGA 140 CAL.APP.3D SUPP.1. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE KAY TSENIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.
